title: fusion-trace-event.v1
description: A single observability event emitted by any component of the fusion stack (gateway, ensemble harness, panel model server, judge/synthesis, or the Cursorkit bridge). Events sharing a trace_id form one observable session. This contract is intentionally standalone and is NOT part of the frozen model-fusion-contract bundle.

trace_id.description: Correlates every event belonging to one fusion session.

span_id.description: Identifies the unit of work that produced this event.

parent_span_id.description: The span that caused this span, enabling waterfall reconstruction.

seq.description: Producer-assigned monotonic counter; ties are broken by collector ingest order.

session_id.description: Optional alias used when a host already has a session identifier distinct from trace_id.

payload.description: Event-specific data. Shape depends on event_type.
